zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelise de Hainault於1094年出生在比利時海瑙特時，她的父親Baudouin II de Hainaut38歲，母親Ida van Leuven32歲。她和Nicholas de Rumigny至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1153年在法國皮卡迪索姆盧馬尼享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelise de Hainault于1094年出生在比利时海瑙特时，她的父亲Baudouin II de Hainaut38岁，母亲Ida van Leuven32岁。她和Nicholas de Rumigny至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1153年在法国皮卡迪索姆盧馬尼享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adelise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelise de Hainault was born in 1094, in Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Baudouin II de Hainaut, was 38 and her mother, Ida van Leuven, was 32. She had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Nicholas de Rumigny. She died in 1153, in Rumigny, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelise de Hainault est née en 1094, à Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Baudouin II de Hainaut, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Ida van Leuven, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Nicholas de Rumigny. Elle est décédée en 1153, à Rumigny, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelise de Hainault 1094 in Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin II de Hainaut 38 und ihre Mutter Ida van Leuven 32. Sie hatte mit Nicholas de Rumigny mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1153 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Rumigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelise de Hainault è nata il nel 1094 nel Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Baudouin II de Hainaut, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Ida van Leuven, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Nicholas de Rumigny. Morì nel 1153, nel Rumigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelise de Hainaultが1094年にベルギーヘイナトで生まれた時，父Baudouin II de Hainautは38歳，母Ida van Leuvenは32歳であった。彼女はNicholas de Rumignyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1153年にフランスピカーディソンメルミグニーで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelise de Hainault(이)가 1094년 벨기에 하인오트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin II de Hainaut(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida van Leuven(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Nicholas de Rumigny(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1153년 프랑스 피카디 솜 럼익니에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelise de Hainault nasceu em 1094, em Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin II de Hainaut, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Ida van Leuven, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Nicholas de Rumigny. Ela faleceu em 1153, em Rumigny, Somme, Picardie, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelise de Hainault родилась в 1094 г. в местности ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Baudouin II de Hainaut было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida van Leuven, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Nicholas de Rumigny. Она умерла в 1153 г. в местности румигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.from 1105 to 1130: mai le 1105 e o'o I le 1130

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelise de Hainault nació en 1094, en Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin II de Hainaut, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Ida van Leuven, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Nicholas de Rumigny. Murió en 1153, en Rumigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
